client.registered_address: 4th Floor, Ananta Towers, 87 Residency Road, Bangalore, 560025

matter_summary: Cap table cleanup ahead of Series A: regularize a pending share allotment for which consideration was received in September 2025, structure exit for one angel via buyback, draft an ESOP plan, and optimize founder shareholding to maintain 60%+ combined promoter control post-ESOP.

phases.name: Phase I: Regularization of Pending Share Allotment
phases.scope_summary: Regularize allotment of shares against ₹45 lakhs received in September 2025 under the private placement framework, including PAS-3 filing.
scope_bullets: Review of transaction structure and applicable provisions under the Companies Act, 2013
Structuring of allotment under the private placement framework
Drafting of Board Resolutions, allotment documentation, and share certificates
Filing of PAS-3 with the Registrar of Companies
outcome_bullets: Legally compliant and fully documented share allotment
Elimination of regulatory exposure arising from the delayed issuance

phases.name: Phase II: Buyback Structuring (Mr. Desai's Exit)
phases.scope_summary: Structure buyback of shares held by Mr. Desai under Section 68 of the Companies Act, 2013, via the board approval route (within the 10% threshold).
scope_bullets: Structuring buyback under Section 68 of the Companies Act, 2013, board approval route
Assessment of free reserves availability and confirmation of the 10% threshold compliance
Drafting of buyback offer documents and board resolutions
outcome_bullets: Clean cash exit for Mr. Desai without dilution to remaining shareholders
Increase in promoter shareholding consistent with the founder optimization objective

phases.name: Phase III: ESOP Plan & Implementation
phases.scope_summary: Draft a full 8% ESOP plan, Letter of Grant template, supporting board and shareholder resolutions, MGT-14 filing, and a tracking spreadsheet for grants, vesting, and exercise.
scope_bullets: Drafting of ESOP plan covering eligibility, vesting, exercise price, plan administration, and treatment on termination
Letter of Grant template covering options, exercise price, vesting schedule, expiration, and other key terms
Drafting of board and shareholder resolutions for plan approval and grant of options
MGT-14 filing for the special resolution
Tracking spreadsheet for grant, vesting, and exercise
outcome_bullets: Investor-grade ESOP framework aligned with Series A diligence expectations
Operational tooling to administer grants and vesting on an ongoing basis

phases.name: Phase IV: Founder Shareholding Optimization
phases.scope_summary: Cap table analysis and structuring to restore combined founder shareholding above 60% post-ESOP, by way of rights issue or selective participation as appropriate.
scope_bullets: Cap table analysis (pre and post the above three phases) and modeling of post-ESOP dilution
Advisory on target shareholding thresholds and dilution planning for Series A
Structuring of rights issue (if required) and selective participation to rebalance holdings
Drafting of associated resolutions and filings
outcome_bullets: Strengthened promoter control above the 60% combined threshold
Improved governance posture for incoming Series A investors

payment_terms: 50% advance to commence work; balance due on delivery of each phase.
out_of_pocket_note: Out-of-pocket expenses including government filing fees, stamp duty, and applicable taxes are excluded and will be charged at actuals.
deferred_or_separate: Secondary share transfer for Ms. Iyer's exit will be quoted separately when the Series A investor is identified, as the structure depends on the incoming investor's terms (typical range ₹25,000–40,000).
